summary: The tender primarily involves the provision of ICT personnel resources on a time and materials basis, with a capped not-to-exceed (NTE) price.
primary_evidence: T&M Services (up to an NTE Price)
proposed Labour Rates for the applicable SFIA skillsets
actual time spent by the Supplier’s Personnel
secondary_indicators: Provision of Services in accordance with the Deed
Supplier’s Quotation is to include pricing on the basis of: Time and Materials (T&M)
The Supplier must provide the ICT Personnel Resources
reasoning: The tender documents consistently emphasize the use of a time and materials pricing model with a capped NTE price, focusing on the provision of ICT personnel resources. The presence of detailed labour rates and the requirement for timesheets further support this classification. There is no significant evidence of a fixed price or outcome-based service model, leading to a high confidence classification as staff augmentation time and materials.
